title: Entitlement to paternity leave pay
content:
Last updated date
11.12.2020
Employment Ordinance
Part IIIA	
3A-6
Section 15G	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
An employee is entitled to pay at the rate specified in section 15I 
in respect of each day on which he has taken paternity leave if—
	
(a)	
he has been employed under a continuous contract for a 
period of not less than 40 weeks immediately before that 
day; and
	
(b)	
he has complied with all the requirements in section 15J 
or 15K.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
